actions.value:
Edge is a zero-knowledge app, so we don't have access to the information you share with our exchange partners.


For support with a recent order or to update any personal information on file with the Mt. Pelerin exchange, please reach out to them here: https://mtpelerin.com/contact - or send an email directly to: hello@mtpelerin.com

 

 

Their support database & FAQ may also help you find the answer you're looking for, located here: https://mtpelerin.com/support
